# services.tee-supplicant

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.tee-supplicant`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.tee-supplicant.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable OP-TEE userspace supplicant. |
| `services.tee-supplicant.package` | `package` | The optee-client package to use. |
| `services.tee-supplicant.pluginPath` | `absolute path` | The directory where plugins will be loaded from on startup. |
| `services.tee-supplicant.reeFsParentPath` | `absolute path` | The directory where the secure filesystem will be stored in the rich execution environment (REE FS). |
| `services.tee-supplicant.trustedApplications` | `list of absolute path` | A list of full paths to trusted applications that will be loaded at runtime by tee-supplicant. |
